channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more
item.description: Apple’s WWDC 2026 event kicked off this morning at 10 a.m. PT at Apple Park, starting a week full of expected announcements around Siri, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more, along with developer events and demos. This year’s event is particularly notable for a couple things. It marks CEO Tim Cook’s last with the company, […]

item.title: Apple dévoile iOS 27 : voici toutes les nouveautés de la mise à jour de l’iPhone
item.description: Apple a profité de sa WWDC 2026 pour dévoiler une salve de nouveautés dopées à l'intelligence artificielle pour iOS 27. De l'app Photos à Safari en passant par Messages ou l'app Téléphone, Apple Intelligence s'infiltre désormais dans presque toutes les apps natives d'iOS. On fait le point sur les grandes nouveautés de la mise à jour.

item.title: watchOS 27 gets a Siri upgrade and perimenopause features
item.description: watchOS snuck in some new health features amid that deluge of AI additions and minor improvements.

item.title: iOS 27 : voici la liste des iPhone qui seront compatibles
item.description: Apple vient de présenter les nouveautés à venir pour la prochaine mise à jour de ses systèmes d’exploitation. La firme de Cupertino en a profité pour dévoiler la liste des iPhone qui seront compatibles avec iOS 27.

item.title: Even your physical offices aren't safe from hackers — experts warn of Silent Ransom Group breaking into businesses to launch ransomware and extortion campaign
item.description: Google is warning about hackers walking into offices, pretending to be IT support.

item.title: « C’est un honneur de toute une vie » : les adieux touchants de Tim Cook pour sa toute dernière keynote Apple
item.description: Pour clôturer la keynote Apple de la WWDC 2026, Tim Cook a prononcé un petit discours qui sonnait comme un adieu pour celui qui va bientôt quitter ses fonctions de CEO.

item.title: Siri devient un kiosque à chatbots : Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT au choix
item.description: Apple ouvre enfin Siri aux IA rivales. Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT : on pourra choisir qui répond à notre place, et l'exclusivité d'OpenAI vole en éclats. Sauf qu'en ouvrant la porte, Apple s'assure surtout de tenir la caisse.

item.title: watchOS 27 : seulement cinq Apple Watch auront droit à la mise à jour
item.description: Annoncée ce lundi lors de la WWDC, la nouvelle version de watchOS, watchOS 27, sera disponible uniquement sur cinq Apple Watch.

item.title: Pentagon says Alibaba, Baidu, BYD and Unitree support China’s military
item.description: The Trump administration released the updated version of the list four months ago and then quickly pulled it without explaining why

item.title: macOS 27 Golden Gate : voici les seuls Mac qui auront droit à la mise à jour cet automne
item.description: C'est fini pour les Mac Intel : Apple réserve l'installation de macOS 27 Golden Gate aux Mac équipés de ses propres puces M. Un chant du cygne pour ces machines qui pourront cependant bénéficier de mises à jour de sécurité pendant encore trois ans.

item.title: Apple just taught your iPhone to finish your sentences, your photos, and your workflows
item.description: Apple is adding new AI-powered features to Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps.

item.title: watchOS 27 : voici toutes les nouveautés de la mise à jour des Apple Watch
item.description: Apple a annoncé la mise à jour des Apple Watch vers watchOS 27. Au menu, beaucoup d'IA... mais pas en France.

item.title: Apple will let you build workflows using AI in its new Shortcuts app
item.description: Shortcuts gets an AI upgrade, letting you describe the workflow you want in a prompt.

item.title: Apple finally unveils long-awaited Apple Intelligence updates at WWDC 2026
item.description: At WWDC 2026, Apple unveiled new Apple Intelligence features that will work with Siri AI to bring AI tools to iPhones, MacBooks, and more.

item.title: Apple WWDC 2026: The 7 biggest announcements
item.description: Apple's keynote at this year's Worldwide Developers Conference was a big one. After months of delays, Apple reintroduced us to its AI-upgraded Siri, which will go beyond what the existing voice assistant can do by offering more personalized help. We also got a look at many other updates coming across the operating systems powering the […]

item.title: WWDC 2026 bonus live blog: Tech Talk with Craig Federighi
item.description: Fresh off the WWDC keynote presentation, The Verge has been invited to an "on-the-record technical deep dive into the bold new architecture enabling Apple Intelligence capabilities." Apple SVP of Software Engineering Craig Federighi and his team will be there, and so will we. The revamped Apple Intelligence is at the heart of nearly every update […]...

item.title: Siri AI et iOS 27 : le récap complet de la WWDC 2026 d’Apple
item.description: Apple a présenté le nouveau Siri AI pendant le keynote de la WWDC 2026. Voici le récapitulatif de toutes les annonces très axées autour d'Apple Intelligence.

item.title: visionOS 27 brings the new Siri to Apple's headset
item.description: Apple's $3,500 headset is also getting an AI upgrade.

item.title: Apple’s iPhone Camera App Is Getting an AI Upgrade in iOS 27
item.description: Siri is now directly embedded into the camera app, and there are more artificial intelligence tools in the Photos app to alter your images.

item.title: Will your Apple Watch run watchOS 27? Apple just quietly dropped 6 current-gen watches from supporting the upgrade, including Ultra and SE models — here is the full list
item.description: Has your Apple Watch survived? These are all the models being cut off from a watchOS upgrade this year, and it's a much longer list than anticipated.

item.title: Apple’s Image Playground doesn’t suck anymore
item.description: Apple's AI image generator is getting a makeover that could make it more competitive.

item.title: Cameras get an Apple Intelligence boost in Apple Home
item.description: Apple Intelligence is coming to cameras connected to Apple Home. At WWDC, Apple announced that with iOS27, its HomeKit Secure Video service will use Apple Intelligence to analyze footage and generate descriptions summarizing what the camera saw. You can also search footage with natural language to find clips from across connected cameras, such as when […]...

item.title: Apple’s Photos app is getting new AI editing features
item.description: A new spatial "Reframe" feature will let users use AI to adjust perspectives.

item.title: AirPods are getting a customizable EQ in iOS 27
item.description: If you've wanted to tweak your AirPods sound, you'll soon get your chance.

item.title: No timeline for availability: Apples new Siri AI will be very late in the EU
item.description: Apple's new Siri AI will, once again, be a little late, especially in some regions.

item.title: Apple's new, AI-powered Siri is finally here — here are the biggest upgrades coming with Siri AI
item.description: Apple has unveiled iOS 27, and its long-awaited AI-powered Siri at WWDC 2026 — here's what you need to know.

item.title: Apple a-t-il avoué qu’iOS était devenu trop lourd avec iOS 27 ?
item.description: Pas de révolution dans iOS 27, et c'est peut-être ça, la vraie nouvelle. Apple passe une année entière à réparer, accélérer et ranger son logiciel : un aveu poli qu'iOS s'était alourdi.

item.title: Apple gives Siri its own dedicated app
item.description: Siri is finally getting its own app.

item.title: Apple quietly kills off support for Intel Macs and MacBooks
item.description: It's an end of an era: Apple no longer supports any Mac with an Intel chip, as it quietly announces that macOS 27 Golden Gate will only work with devices with Apple silicon sold after 2020.

item.title: Apple just gave 'Siri AI' its biggest upgrade ever — whether iPhone users asked for it or not
item.description: Apple's biggest Siri AI upgrade ever could transform the iPhone experience, but I’m not convinced more AI is what users want.

item.title: Apple announces visionOS 27 with Siri AI
item.description: Along with new software for Macs and iPhones, Apple announced visionOS 27 during its keynote presentation at WWDC on Monday. Like its other platforms, visionOS 27 will feature Apple's updated Siri AI assistant and the new dedicated Siri app. While wearing the Vision Pro, you can use visual intelligence to ask Siri "about anything in […]

item.title: Apple Intelligence ne sera pas totalement gratuit
item.description: Comme prévu, Apple a dévoilé la nouvelle version de Siri et Apple Intelligence, propulsés désormais par Google Gemini. Sans surprise, l'IA d'Apple ne sera pas totalement gratuite et illimitée.

item.title: Siri Mode coming to the iPhone Camera app
item.description: Apple announced Siri Mode in the iPhone Camera app at WWDC.

item.title: How to download the iOS 27 developer beta
item.description: Registering as an iOS developer is easy, and it will grant you access to the iOS 27 developer beta.

item.title: Siri AI ne sera pas disponible en France et, pour Apple, c’est encore la faute de l’UE
item.description: À l'occasion de la WWDC, Apple a annoncé que la nouvelle version de Siri ne serait pas proposée en Europe.

item.title: iOS 27 gets new AI photo editing tools
item.description: iOS 27 will add a slew of new AI photo editing tools.

item.title: Le navigateur d’Apple va pister les baisses de prix et réassorts pour vous
item.description: Baptisée Notify Me, cette option du navigateur Safari permet de déléguer la surveillance des pages web au système afin de suivre les réassorts de produits ou les ouvertures d'inscriptions.

item.title: iOS 27 Beta release: What time and where to download it
item.description: Apple is set to release its first iOS 27 beta imminently. Here's how you can get in on the fun.

item.title: Siri AI, iOS 27 et Apple Intelligence : la liste complète des iPhone, iPad et Mac compatibles, de l’iPhone 15 Pro aux puces M1
item.description: Apple a enfin sorti son Siri nouvelle génération, baptisé Siri AI et propulsé par Gemini. Mais avant de rêver, vérifiez votre matériel : la liste des appareils compatibles est courte, et l'Europe en fait les frais.

item.title: Apple is fixing the headache of splitting the bill with its new Siri in Camera feature
item.description: "If you're grabbing a bite with friends and point your iPhone at the bill, then [you can] select what you ordered to split the tab with Apple Cash," said Apple VP of Software Sebastien Marineau-Mes.

item.title: How to download the macOS 27 Golden Gate developer beta
item.description: Can't wait for macOS 27 Golden Gate? Then you can try out the developer beta, but be warned: installing it can be a somewhat involved (and costly) process, but we’ll walk you through all the steps required.

item.title: Amid protest, Apple announces Ask to browse, other child safety tools
item.description: Apple unveiled new Child Account features at WWDC while facing a protest from child safety groups.

item.title: Apple rend enfin Siri intelligent avec Siri AI (mais pas tout de suite en Europe…)
item.description: Siri va subir une transformation majeure en 2026 avec l'intégration de l'IA générative et de Gemini, offrant une expérience utilisateur améliorée. L'assistant bénéficiera d'un nouveau look, d'une voix ajustable et d'une meilleure compréhension contextuelle pour des réponses plus pertinentes. Une nouvelle application Siri permettra de consulter l'historique des conversations et de synchroniser les interactions sur tous les appareils Apple....

item.title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Ready to Get Personal
item.description: From a stand-alone app to a Google Gemini partnership, here’s everything you need to know from WWDC 2026 about Apple’s upcoming overhaul of Siri.

item.title: US citizen pleads guilty to spying for the People's Republic of China – agent was tasked with stealing information from DoJ to help launch cyber espionage campaign
item.description: US citizen admitted working with multiple individuals on data exfiltration.

item.title: Apple Intelligence dans Maison : 4K, résumés IA et recherche en langage naturel
item.description: Apple Intelligence s'invite dans l'app Maison : descriptions automatiques de vos clips de caméra, notifications regroupées, enregistrement 4K. Et, plus discrètement, une série de correctifs sous le capot que les utilisateurs réclamaient depuis des années.

item.title: Apple va trier automatiquement vos (trop nombreux) onglets dans Safari
item.description: Grâce à l’intégration de la nouvelle génération d'Apple Intelligence, le navigateur Safari devient capable de trier et regrouper automatiquement vos onglets par thématiques.

item.title: Apple Intelligence is coming to the Shortcuts app
item.description: Home and Shortcuts are not immune to Apple's AI upgrades.

item.title: Apple puts parents back in control of kids’ iPhone use
item.description: Apple is putting control back into the hands of parents with more granular screen time features.

item.title: Apple is adding Apple Intelligence across its default apps
item.description: Apple Intelligence will soon be able to watch browser tabs and update passwords.

item.title: Siri is getting an all new app experience later this year
item.description: Siri will soon be able to provide something like to the standard chatbot experience.

item.title: Apple dévoile macOS Golden Gate, une mise à jour qui se concentre sur l’optimisation
item.description: La firme de Cupertino vient de dévoiler les premières nouveautés à venir dans la prochaine mouture du système d’exploitation des Mac. macOS Golden Gate mettra l’accent sur l’optimisation et l’amélioration de l’interface Liquid Glass.

item.title: Apple’s Health app can now tell you if you’re in perimenopause
item.description: Cycle tracker will now notify women when their cycle patterns are suggestive of perimenopause.

item.title: Le télescope James-Webb révèle la composition surprenante de la comète interstellaire 3I/Atlas !
item.description: Le télescope spatial James-Webb de la Nasa a recueilli sa première signature chimique infrarouge moyenne d'un objet interstellaire lors d'une récente observation de la comète 3I/Atlas. Les résultats concernant la composition chimique et le comportement de la comète sont étranges.

item.title: Apple gives Safari a makeover at WWDC 2026
item.description: Safari is back in updated form at WWDC 2026, with new features for users to check out.

item.title: Apple introduces systemwide dictation
item.description: Apple's new dictation system could compete with Wispr Flow and others.

item.title: What is the release date for Sweet Magnolias season 5 on Netflix?
item.description: Maddie's made the leap to life in New York City, but her girls are never far behind. With Serenity a distant memory, when does Sweet Magnolias season 5 arrive on Netflix?

item.title: Apple’s long-awaited AI Siri overhaul is finally here
item.description: The idea behind the new "Siri AI" is to turn the assistant from a voice controlled assistant into an AI companion that can do a lot more.

item.title: Apple is redesigning Screen Time and overhauling child controls
item.description: At WWDC 2026, Apple announced an overhaul to its Screen Time parental control features that aim to improve its safeguarding features to protect children who use iPhone, iPad, and Mac devices. Some of the new features coming with Apple's iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27 updates include giving parents and guardians more control over […]

item.title: macOS Golden Gate puts Siri AI into Spotlight
item.description: macOS Golden Gate will add Siri AI into Spotlight.

item.title: Apple says it’s fixed the awful search function for emails, photos
item.description: Apple says a completely rebuilt Search function will competently find the emails, photos and other content you are searching for.

item.title: Apple dévoile macOS 27 Golden Gate, un OS bien plus performant et réactif
item.description: Après la grande refonte visuelle de macOS 26, Apple itère avec macOS 27 Golden Gate, une nouvelle version de son OS pour Mac qui se focalise sur des optimisations et la stabilité du système.

item.title: Amazon is launching AI-generated custom merch
item.description: Amazon is expanding its print-on-demand features to AI-generated designs created using Alexa for Shopping for products like T-shirts, water bottles, and hoodies. Shoppers can use text prompts to generate images that are then printed on to blanks for sale on Amazon. They can then share the link to the design so other people can buy […]

item.title: Apple announces iPadOS 27
item.description: Today at Apple's Worldwide Developers Conference, the company announced new features coming to the iPad with iPadOS 27 including optimizations such as apps launching up to 30 percent faster by intelligently preloading needed info, and more responsive switching between multiple apps. As with the new versions of Apple's other operating systems launching this year including […]...

item.title: iOS 27 va radicalement changer la façon dont vos enfants utilisent leur iPhone
item.description: iOS 27 a été développé en partenariat avec des experts de la santé et introduit de nouveaux outils de restriction pour les applications, la navigation web et les communications afin de mieux protéger les enfants.

item.title: The UK Is Betting on a Billion-Dollar AI Supercomputer to Kick Its Addiction to US Tech
item.description: The British government thinks a state-backed infrastructure initiative will help supercharge homegrown chip startups.

item.title: Apple reintroduces the AI-powered Siri it announced at WWDC 2024
item.description: At WWDC 2026, Apple resurrected its AI-powered voice assistant, now named Siri AI.

item.title: Apple announces macOS 27 Golden Gate at WWDC: New Siri AI tools, Liquid Glass tweaks
item.description: Golden Gate will be the official name for macOS 27.

item.title: Apples new, smarter Siri AI is finally here
item.description: At WWDC 2026, Apple officially announced a smarter, AI-infused version of Siri.

item.title: Apple unveils iOS 27 at WWDC 2026
item.description: Apple took to the stage at WWDC 2026 and showed off everything iOS 27 will have to offer when it launches later this year.

item.title: Apple expands parental controls to include automatic image filtering
item.description: Apple is beefing up parental controls to address concerns about child protection.

item.title: 'The time has come to reclaim what was stolen from us': Bernie Sanders wants the American public to own 50% stake in AI companies
item.description: Under this proposal, US AI firms could have to cough up a one-time 50% tax (in shares) into an AI Sovereign Wealth Fund.

item.title: Apple announces Siri AI and its next generation of Apple Intelligence
item.description: Two years after first revealing its plans for Apple Intelligence and a smarter Siri that never fully materialized, at WWDC, Apple just revealed a new set of AI features and a smarter, more personalized Siri. Apple calls Siri AI an "entirely new version of Siri" and says it's both more conversational and more capable than […]

item.title: Meta Deletes Face-Recognition System From Its Smart Glasses App After WIRED Report
item.description: The code WIRED identified is gone from the latest version of Meta AI, the companion app for the company’s smart glasses. Meta won’t say why or whether it’s coming back.

item.title: Apple's new OSes are getting a massive speed boost
item.description: App launches, AirDrop and other features are getting a massive speed boost on Apple's new OSes.

item.title: Trader Joe’s shoppers have just days left to claim up to $102
item.description: A $7.4 million settlement could put cash in customers’ pockets, but the deadline to file a claim is almost here. If you shopped at Trader Joe’s in mid-2019, you have until Tuesday to file a claim to be included in a $7.4 million class action lawsuit brought against the popular grocery chain. But be forewarned: Qualifying for the settlement isn’t so straightforward....

item.title: Lizzo has a viral explanation for her declining success—and it’s dividing social media
item.description: The singer’s new album ‘Bitch’ didn’t get much traction on streaming services. She’s blaming platforms like Spotify. On Friday, June 5, Lizzo released her new album Bitch. It’s not doing so well.

item.title: Whats new with Liquid Glass? What was announced at WWDC 2026.
item.description: Apple just announced design updates to Liquid Glass at WWDC.

item.title: AirPods are finally getting a custom EQ in iOS 27, this is not a drill!
item.description: Nearly 10 years since AirPods launched, they finally getting a custom EQ

item.title: Apple is tweaking its controversial Liquid Glass design
item.description: While some users liked the sleek, transparent designs that look "glassy," others found Apple's design overhaul from last year to be hard to read.
